flavor_text.en: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.
The hardness of Floragato's fur depends on the Pokémon's mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp.

text.en: Choose a spot from among your opponent's Active Spot and Bench. At the end of your opponent's next turn, do 70 damage to the Pokémon in the spot you chose.

flavor_text.en: The thread it secretes from its rear is as strong as wire. The secret behind the thread's strength is the topic of ongoing research.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, le Pokémon Défenseur ne peut pas battre en retraite.

flavor_text.en: Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.

text.en: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Échangez ce Pokémon avec 1 de vos Pokémon de Banc.

flavor_text.en: It's highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents.

text.en: Heal 10 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 10 dégâts à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch.
Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone.
This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon.
Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet.

text.en: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 60 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu’à ce que vous obteniez un côté pile. Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town.
Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients.

text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Grass or Metal Pokémon, this attack does 40 more damage.

flavor_text.en: The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

text.en: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu'à obtenir un côté pile. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, attacks used by the Defending Pokémon cost {C}{C} more.
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, les attaques utilisées par le Pokémon Défenseur coûtent {C}{C} de plus.

flavor_text.en: It drains the life-force from vegetation, causing nearby forests to instantly wither and fields to turn barren.

text.en: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.
text.fr: Placez un Pokémon de base au hasard de votre deck sur votre Banc.

flavor_text.en: Its flame sac is small, so energy is always leaking out. This energy is released from the dent atop Fuecoco's head and flickers to and fro.
The valve in Crocalor's flame sac is closely connected to its vocal cords. This Pokémon utters a guttural cry as it spews flames every which way.
Skeledirge's gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Its firepower increases when it fights, reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. It likes berries that are rich in fat.

text.en: Discard a {R} Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez une Énergie {R} de ce Pokémon.

text.en: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.
text.fr: Si au moins l'un de vos Pokémon a été mis K.O. par les dégâts d'une attaque pendant le dernier tour de votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: The envy accumulated within curved beads that sparked multiple conflicts has clad itself in fire and become a Pokémon.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts et effets provenant d'attaques infligés à ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking things.

text.en: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Échangez ce Pokémon contre l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

flavor_text.en: The hardworking Quaxwell observes people and Pokémon from various regions and incorporates their movements into its own dance routines.
Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.
Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio.
Its water ring is made from seawater mixed with a sticky fluid that Finizen secretes from its blowhole.

text.en: This attack also does 50 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 50 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: This hero of the ocean swims at a speed of 50 knots and saves drowning people and Pokémon.
It lives in frigid regions in pods of five or so individuals. It loves the minerals found in snow and ice.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Défenseur est maintenant Paralysé.

flavor_text.en: Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings.

text.en: If you have no cards in your deck, this attack can be used for 1 Water Energy.

flavor_text.en: Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.

text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.
text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas attaquer.

flavor_text.en: It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart.

text.en: If any of your Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an attack during your opponent's last turn, this attack does 60 more damage.
text.fr: Si au moins l'un de vos Pokémon a été mis K.O. par les dégâts d'une attaque pendant le dernier tour de votre adversaire, cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack.
This Pokémon lives in forests and craggy areas. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator.
It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique.
It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

text.en: Discard all Water Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 130 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.
Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

text.en: Discard a Lightning Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Pawmot's fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.
It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.

text.en: If you have 4 or more Lightning Energy in play, this attack does 70 more damage.

flavor_text.en: These Pokémon make their nests on coastal cliffs. The nests have a strange, crackling texture, and they're a popular delicacy.
It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There's hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.

text.en: This attack also does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 30 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.
The yeast in Fidough's breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c’est face, cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon's body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages.

text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is a Pokémon ex, this attack does 70 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est un Pokémon-{ex}, cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon's evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Confus.

flavor_text.en: An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.
It spends its time running around wastelands. If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge.

text.en: This attack does 20 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts de plus pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph.

text.fr: Défaussez une carte de votre main. Si vous ne le pouvez pas, cette attaque ne fait rien.
text.en: Discard a card from your hand. If you can't, this attack does nothing.

flavor_text.en: This friendly Pokémon doesn't like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever.

text.en: This attack does 20 more damage for each Psychic Pokémon in your discard pile.

flavor_text.en: A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn't like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head.

text.en: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu'à obtenir un côté pile. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez 3 pièces. Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It is extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment, then thrashing away the next instant.

text.en: This attack does more damage equal to the damage this Pokémon has on it.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige des dégâts supplémentaires égaux à ceux que ce Pokémon a déjà subis.

flavor_text.en: Some researchers theorize that Primeape remains angry even when inside a Poké Ball.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 30 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 30 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core.
This kind of Tauros, known as the Combat Breed, is distinguished by its thick, powerful muscles and its fierce disposition.
Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.

flavor_text.en: It coils its 10 tentacles around prey and sucks out their nutrients, causing the prey pain. The folds along the rim of its head are a popular delicacy.

text.en: This Pokémon is now Confused.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon est maintenant Confus.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents’ attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws.

text.en: If this Pokémon's remaining HP is 60 or less, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: S'il reste 60 PV ou moins à ce Pokémon, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: It slowly brings its exceedingly heavy head down upon the ground, splitting the earth open with huge fissures that run over 160 feet deep.

text.en: Discard 2 {R} Energy from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez 2 Énergies {R} de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.
It's dangerous for Wooper to travel alone. They line up in groups of three or four and help each other as they walk around the wetlands.

text.fr: Défaussez la carte du dessus du deck de votre adversaire.
text.en: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

flavor_text.en: It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from one shore to the other.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien.

flavor_text.en: It uses its normally folded third set of legs when in Showdown Mode. This places a huge burden on its body, so it can't stay in this mode for long.
Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.

text.en: This Pokémon also does 20 damage to itself.
text.fr: Ce Pokémon s'inflige aussi 20 dégâts.

flavor_text.en: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.
To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.

text.en: If your Pokémon in play have 3 or more different types of Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.

flavor_text.en: Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est pile, cette attaque ne fait rien. Si c'est face, pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, évitez tous les dégâts et les effets d'attaques infligés à ce Pokémon.
text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises.
This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it's satisfied with the result.
These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other's hammers by smashing them together.

text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Gigaton Hammer.
text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas utiliser Marteau Mastoc.

flavor_text.en: The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.
The steel section is Varoom's actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Poisoned.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Empoisonné.

flavor_text.en: Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.

text.en: Take a Metal Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.

text.en: 1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.

text.en: Flip a coin. If tails, during your next turn, this Pokémon can't attack.

flavor_text.en: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

text.en: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage for each heads.

flavor_text.en: The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

text.en: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, discard a random Energy from your opponent's Active Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: The little one just appeared one day. They all live together like a family, but the relationship between the three is still unclear.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they're out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

text.en: If you played a Supporter card from your hand during this turn, this attack does 60 more damage.
text.fr: Si vous avez joué une carte Supporter de votre main pendant ce tour, cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider's body heat warms Cyclizar's back and lifts the Pokémon's spirit.
Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony.

rules_text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, take a Lightning Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Lightning Pokémon.

rules_text.fr: Le Pokémon de Niveau 2 auquel cette carte est attachée n'a pas de Coût de Retraite.
rules_text.en: The Stage 2 Pokémon this card is attached to has no Retreat Cost.
Discard a random Energy from among the Energy attached to all of your opponent's Pokémon that have an Ability.
Each player shuffles the cards in their hand into their deck, then draws that many cards.
rules_text.fr: Chaque joueur mélange les cartes de sa main avec son deck, puis pioche ce même nombre de cartes.

rules_text.en: During this turn, attacks used by your Pawmot do +80 damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex.
Flip a coin. If heads, put a random Item card from your deck into your hand. If tails, put a random Pokémon Tool card from your deck into your hand.
Look at a random Supporter card that's not Penny from your opponent's deck and shuffle it back into their deck. Use the effect of that card as the effect of this card.
rules_text.fr: Regardez une des cartes Supporter du deck de votre adversaire au hasard qui n'est pas Pania et mélangez-la avec son deck. Utilisez son effet en tant qu'effet de cette carte.

rules_text.en: Once during each player's turn, that player may flip a coin. If heads, that player puts a random Pokémon from their deck into their hand. You may play only 1 Stadium card during your turn. Put it next to the Active Spot, and discard it if another Stadium comes into play. A Stadium with the same name can't be played.

text.en: Put 1 random Basic Pokémon from your deck onto your Bench.
text.fr: Placez un Pokémon de base au hasard de votre deck sur votre Banc.

text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu'à obtenir un côté pile. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

It's dangerous for Wooper to travel alone. They line up in groups of three or four and help each other as they walk around the wetlands.

If you have 4 or more Lightning Energy in play, this attack does 70 more damage.
1 of your opponent's Pokémon is chosen at random for each Metal Energy attached to this Pokémon. For each time a Pokémon was chosen, do 40 damage to it.

rules_text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, put a random Item card from your deck into your hand. If tails, put a random Pokémon Tool card from your deck into your hand.

flavor_text.en: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.
The hardness of Floragato's fur depends on the Pokémon's mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp.

text.en: If your opponent’s Active Pokémon is a Pokémon {ex}, this attack does 70 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est un Pokémon-{ex}, cette attaque inflige 70 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating.

text.en: This attack does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 10 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.
Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

text.en: Discard a Lightning Energy from this Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: Pawmot's fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

text.en: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 20 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce jusqu'à obtenir un côté pile. Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon.
This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it's satisfied with the result.
These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other's hammers by smashing them together.

text.en: Flip a coin for each {M} Energy attached to this Pokémon. This attack does 50 damage for each heads.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce pour chaque Énergie {M} attachée à ce Pokémon. Cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts pour chaque côté face.

flavor_text.en: Its body seems to be made up of 1,000 coins. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody.
flavor_text.fr:
Son corps serait composé de 1 000 pièces. Sociable,
il peut se lier d'amitié très rapidement avec n'importe qui.

text.en: If this Pokémon has at least 2 extra {R} Energy attached, this attack does 60 more damage.
text.fr: Si ce Pokémon a au moins 2 Énergies {R} de plus, cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: This attack does 20 damage for each Benched Pokémon (both yours and your opponent's).
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts multipliés par le nombre de Pokémon de Banc (les vôtres et ceux de votre adversaire).

text.en: This attack also does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 10 dégâts à un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire.

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 80 more damage.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, cette attaque inflige 80 dégâts de plus.

flavor_text.en: It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade.

rules_text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, take a Lightning Energy from your Energy Zone and attach it to 1 of your Benched Lightning Pokémon.
